description: Full refund of escrowed scrip when a dispute is resolved in the buyer's favor. Amount must equal the original scrip:buy-hold amount (full refund only — no partial refunds in v1). reservation_id must reference an active reservation. dispute_msg must reference a dispute operation resolved in buyer's favor. State effect: buyer balance increases by amount, Forge Refund(reservation_id) releases the escrow.

args.name: buyer
args.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) of the buyer receiving the refund.

args.name: amount
args.description: Full refund amount in micro-tokens. Must equal the original scrip:buy-hold amount.

args.name: reservation_id
args.description: Forge reservation from the original scrip:buy-hold. Must be active.

args.name: dispute_msg
args.description: Message ID of the dispute resolution that found in the buyer's favor.
